title: Leucostegia pallida
taxonomy: Leucostegia pallida is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is classified under the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Pteridophyta, and the class Polypodiopsida. The genus Leucostegia is a group of ferns that are native to tropical regions of Asia. The species Leucostegia pallida is characterized by its delicate fronds and is often found in shaded, humid environments. Further research may be required for a comprehensive understanding of its classification within the plant kingdom.
